rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY** GUARDIANSHIP OF HAYDEN ANGELO DE BARROS CHEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) At the 8/11/2021 hearing counsel was advised to file the following, prior to the next calling of this matter: An amended petition to include fees, Costco receipts, ARCR expenses, if applicable, and bank statements. Attorney Lon Lazar has not followed the court directive at the 8/11/2021 hearing and instead filed a second supplement and did not address the other examiner notes. 2) On 04/08/2019 the court order page 2 line 6 states, "No other reimbursement for childcare are allowed without prior court approval. No court approval was sought for $5,385.00 in childcare expenses already reimbursed in this account. Examiner requested receipts for all entries. 3) On 04/08/2019 the court order page 2 line 9 states "Refund of $3,753.74 for life insurance premium paid shall be reflected in the next account." No such refund appears in the account. 4) Original statements not filed in accordance with CRC 7.575(b). [Prob. C. 2620(c).] 5) Has not filed mandatory judicial council form GC-400. 6) Please explain the legal basis for the guardianship paying legal expenses related to setting up the ward's inheritance estate. Please provide attorney timesheets for all legal expenses paid to ARCR. 7) Please provide legal authority for including the items listed on Schedule F Liabilities and file receipts for all entries. 8) Attorney fees are not mentioned in this account. The Court prefers to determine the amount of fees at the time an account is considered. [LRSF 14.56 B.] Attorney filed a Supplement now requesting fees. This must be filed as an amendment and noticed. 9) Has not filed notice of hearing for the petition. Petitioner alleges co-guardian received notice. Only notice filed was 7/21/2021 for a Supplement to Third Account.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND L. MAR REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Deposition Questions
rulings.Rulings: This tentative is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. Respondents' Motion to Compel Responses to Deposition Questions under CCP Sections 2025.460 and 2025.480 is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. A deponent who has objected to a question and refused to answer bears the burden of justifying such refusal. Mark Maxam has failed to meet that burden. Mr. Maxam is ordered to provide Respondents the code to the garage and answer the deposition question: "Did Greg at any time during the last two and a half years tell you that he did not want you to occupy the property?" Mr. Maxam is further ordered to submit to further deposition examination as may reasonably be required by Respondent's counsel within thirty days of the date of this order. Sanctions are awarded to Respondents pursuant to CCP Section 2025.480 for this motion on which they have prevailed in the total amount of $1,067.50 for attorney's fees and $60 for filing fees. Mr. Maxam is ordered to pay Respondents $1,127.50 within ten days of the date of this order. Respondents shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. Petitioner is ordered to lodge with the clerk in Department 204 a proposed order consistent with this tentative by the time set for this hearing. Remote appearance is strongly encouraged, in conformity with the current General Order of the Probate and Mental Health Division, available on the court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/probate. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND L. MAR REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Subpoenaed Documents
rulings.Rulings: This tentative is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. Respondents' Motion to Compel Production of Subpoenaed Documents under CCP Sections 2025.460 and 2025.480 is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. Mark Maxam failed to produce any documents under his control that were specified in the deposition subpoena. Mr. Maxam is ordered to produce all responsive documents within five days of the date of this order. Sanctions are awarded to Respondents pursuant to CCP Section 2025.480 for this motion on which they have prevailed in the total amount of $1,067.50 for attorney's fees and $60 for filing fees. Mr. Maxam is ordered to pay Respondents $1,127.50 within ten days of the date of this order. Respondents shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. Petitioner is ordered to lodge with the clerk in Department 204 a proposed order consistent with this tentative by the time set for this hearing. Remote appearance is strongly encouraged, in conformity with the current General Order of the Probate and Mental Health Division, available on the court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/probate. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEWIS E. AND MARGARET E. BELL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/30/2021. ISSUES: 1) Notice still does not appear to be proper. Please explain why notice in accordance with Probate Code 851 et seq and CCP 413.10 has not been personally served on the co-trustees. Matter continued to allow time for proper personal service. 2) Venue is a threshold issue that must be determined prior to the petition. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/15/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN QUINCY ADAMS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): Second hearing for same issues. 1) There has been no filed response to the following Examiner Notes: a. Please explain why a petition for probate has been filed in there are no assets. b. Petitioner must check a box on the petition page 3 under #5(a) (3) or (4) and (5) or (6) and (7) or (8). c. Please explain why petitioner checked on page 2 #3(g)(d) other named executors will not act because of declination when the petition alleges Decedent died intestate. d. Petitioner must state the relationship to Decedent and address of Lester Lewis and Jessina Adams on page 4 under #8. e. Petitioner must be listed on page 4 under #8 including the name and relationship to decedent, age, and address. f. All heirs must be listed on page 4 under #8. The date of death must be specified for all deceased heirs. [LRSF 14.18] g. Please provide the legal basis for filing a notice of proposed action when Ivery Hammon Jr has not been appointed. h. Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form. [LRSF 14.18 E.] i. Petitioner must file Notice of Petition to Administer Estate (DE-121). j. Petitioner must file Duties and Liabilities of Personal Representative (DE-147). k. Petitioner must file proof of publication. l. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order (DE-140) to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.
